featureName: BUG-042-006: Spec 042 state.json audit text is stale and contradicts the current Gate G028 fail-loud policy

executionHistory.notes: Discover phase complete. Bug packet authored under specs/042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern/bugs/BUG-042-006-state-json-stale-audit-text/ in response to self-hosted readiness re-scan finding HL-RESCAN-007 (lens: generic-only / SST-defaults; surface: specs/042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern/state.json). Identified 9 distinct stale narrative excerpts across 4 execution.completedPhaseClaims[*].notes records (regression line 44, simplify line 52, stabilize line 60, security line 68) and 5 execution.pendingTransitionRequests[*] reason / closeReason fields (lines 212, 222, 226, 232, 234) in specs/042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern/state.json. All 9 excerpts praise the now-FORBIDDEN substitution form ${HOST_BIND_ADDRESS:-127.0.0.1}: as the canonical loopback-default pattern. That praise was accurate when written (2026-05-09) but was reversed by BUG-029-003 (HEAD eec1437c, 2026-05-14) which made the ${VAR:-default} form FORBIDDEN by Gate G028 NO-DEFAULTS / fail-loud SST policy per .github/instructions/smackerel-no-defaults.instructions.md. Live deploy/compose.deploy.yml on HEAD already uses the fail-loud ${HOST_BIND_ADDRESS:?HOST_BIND_ADDRESS must be set by deploy adapter}: form (lines 128, 185, 243, 315). Compose contract test internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go already rejects the praised form via the BUG-042-003 / BUG-042-004 / BUG-042-005 adversarial sub-tests. Severity P2 (live file compliant; defect is misleading historical narrative). Bug packet artifacts created: spec.md (line-precise stale-excerpt evidence table + AC-1 through AC-6), design.md (two-part reconciliation approach: append authoritative reconciliation entry + prepend leading [SUPERSEDED by BUG-029-003 ...] marker on each stale excerpt; DD-1 through DD-8; precedent template = spec 044 HL-RESCAN-007 close-out at HEAD b715d143), scopes.md (single scope, full Gherkin SCN-042-006-A through SCN-042-006-D, implementation plan, test plan with E2E justification, 3-part DoD), scenario-manifest.json (4 scenarios pinned to static-json-contract test type with adversarial proof of non-tautology), report.md (discover-phase stub), uservalidation.md (acceptance checklist, items unchecked until bubbles.validate certifies). NO production-runtime files modified. NO modification to specs/042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern/state.json (that is the implement phase, not the discover phase). Out-of-scope: deploy/compose.deploy.yml, internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go, .github/instructions/smackerel-no-defaults.instructions.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md, any spec other than 042. Next required owner: bubbles.design — refines design.md (must preserve DD-1 through DD-8). Discover phase claim recorded under provenance bubbles.bug. currentPhase remains 'discovery' until bubbles.design accepts the transition request below.

See .github/instructions/smackerel-no-defaults.instructions.md]'; DD-1 through DD-7 preserved verbatim; DD-6 refined (extends spec-044 precedent shape to name the now-FORBIDDEN form by exact substring :-127.0.0.1 and to self-attest 'RETAINED FOR AUDIT HISTORY ONLY'); DD-8 amended (test file path renamed from internal/deploy/state_json_audit_reconciliation_contract_test.go to internal/deploy/state_audit_reconciliation_test.go for parity with compose_contract_test.go naming pattern; single parent function TestSpec042_StateJsonHasReconciliationEntry_PostBUG029003 with 3 sub-tests A live-file / B adversarial-reconciliation-stripped / C table-driven adversarial-marker-stripped × 9); DD-9 added (entry-shape schema reconciliation: phaseLog -> execution.completedPhaseClaims with field-shape mapping at -> completedAt, action -> [ACTION:] tag inside notes, outcome -> body of notes, evidence -> [EVIDENCE: key=value;] block inside notes; agent and scope filled with bubbles.implement and null). Verified marker literal appears verbatim in 3 places in design.md via grep -c -F (Part 2 fenced block, diff example, Sub-test A assertion table). report.md appended with 'Design Specialist Evidence — bubbles.design — 2026-05-15' section documenting: finalized marker literal + 7-element citation checklist; finalized reconciliation entry shape + canonical content + DD-9 schema mapping rationale; finalized regression test design + 3 sub-tests + non-tautology proof per bubbles-test-integrity skill; explicit list of files NOT touched by this design phase. Test phase complete. Coverage assessment per Canonical Test Taxonomy: Go unit (live-file contract) PASS via sub-test A (parses live state.json, asserts entry presence + 7-element citation checklist + leading-marker prefix on each of the 9 DD-9 fields); Go adversarial unit (reconciliation-entry-stripped) PASS via sub-test B (in-memory deep-copy strips reconciliation entry; validator returns non-nil error mentioning spec_042_audit_reconciliation_post_BUG-029-003 AND BUG-042-006); Go adversarial unit (marker-stripped, table-driven) PASS via sub-test C (9 inner sub-cases; per row strips marker from one of the 9 DD-9 fields; validator returns non-nil error naming the affected field path AND BUG-042-006); Python unit N/A; Integration N/A; E2E API N/A per scopes.md Test Plan justification (static-file contract; the contract test IS the consumer-side end-to-end check); E2E UI N/A; Stress N/A. Adversarial regression contract per bubbles-test-integrity skill confirmed: sub-tests B and C share the SAME validateAuditReconciliation() validator function with sub-test A so a regression in the validator surfaces in ALL three sub-tests simultaneously. Each adversarial mutation forces a RED outcome; silent-skip path mathematically impossible. Cross-package regression smoke ./smackerel.sh test unit --go EXIT=0 ALL GREEN. Existing TestComposeContract_* tests remain green. git diff --stat for deploy/, compose_contract_test.go, smackerel-no-defaults.instructions.md, copilot-instructions.md is EMPTY. No live-stack regressions. Non-tautological adversarial coverage on every FROZEN DD-9 field. Next required owner: bubbles.validate.

Validate phase complete. Certification gate matrix: G023 state-transition-guard PASS (re-run after artifact updates; exit 0); G024 All scopes Done before spec done PASS (single scope BUG-042-006-scope-1 flips not_started to done with dodChecked: 8 of 8 in this close-out edit); G025 Per-DoD-item raw evidence at least 10 lines PASS (items A-H carry raw terminal output blocks); G027 Phase-Scope coherence PASS (completedPhaseClaims advance to 8 phases discover/design/plan/implement/test/validate/audit/docs; single scope reaches done); G028 NO-DEFAULTS / fail-loud SST PASS (':-127.0.0.1' substring remains in state.json for audit immutability BUT every occurrence (12 of 12) is marker-attested by the FROZEN SUPERSEDED prefix per DoD F; the binding fail-loud form is documented as the canonical pattern); G041 Anti-manipulation PASS (DoD items remained checkbox format throughout; no items removed without justification; no invented statuses). Append-only audit immutability verification: git diff specs/042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern/state.json shows only marker prefixes added at 12 indices and one new reconciliation entry appended at the tail of completedPhaseClaims; zero historical substance deleted; zero historical narratives rewritten; the original wording immediately follows each marker, unchanged; python3 -c json.load continues to PASS (DoD D). User-facing verification: 'Would this fix fool a user?' - NO. A future agent or operator reading specs/042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern/state.json will see the SUPERSEDED marker literal at the start of every stale narrative naming the policy-reversal source (BUG-029-003), the new fail-loud form, and the binding instruction file. Single scope BUG-042-006-scope-1 certified done. Next required owner: bubbles.audit.

Audit phase complete. Findings: anti-fabrication (G021) PASS - DoD items A-H carry raw terminal output captured during the implement/test/validate session; evidence is session-bound and tool-sourced, not narrative-fabricated. Cross-agent output verification (G020) PASS - every specialist phase's outputs verified: implement-phase file mutations confirmed by grep + python3 json.load; test-phase results confirmed by go test -v raw output; validate-phase certification confirmed by lint + transition guard exit codes. Single-stream commit hygiene PASS - only 3 paths staged (the bug folder, parent state.json, and new test file); the 40+ unrelated untracked/modified files in the repo working tree are NOT touched by this commit. Terminal discipline PASS - all file mutations performed via IDE tools (multi_replace_string_in_file, replace_string_in_file, create_file); no 'cat >', no 'tee', no '>', no '>>', no python3 -c open(p,'w'), no python3 << PYEOF ... json.dump; read-only python3 << EOF ... json.load for inspection only. PII discipline PASS - evidence blocks use ~/smackerel paths, NOT absolute /home/<user>/smackerel paths (per gitleaks linux-home-username-leak rule + critical-rules.md user memory); bash .github/bubbles/scripts/pii-scan.sh will run against git diff --cached before commit. No fabrication, no cross-agent drift, no terminal-discipline violations, no PII leaks, no out-of-scope changes. Next required owner: bubbles.docs.

Docs phase complete. No external operational docs touched. This bug is a static-file audit-history reconciliation defect against specs/042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern/state.json. The 'consumers' are file readers (humans, agents, the Bubbles framework's state guards). The reconciliation entry's evidenceRef (report.md anchor #reconciliation-evidence) is the consumer documentation surface. No code/runtime docs need updates: the binding policy (Gate G028 fail-loud SST) is already documented in .github/instructions/smackerel-no-defaults.instructions.md and .github/copilot-instructions.md (RO from this bug's perspective); the live deploy/compose.deploy.yml already uses the fail-loud form; the compose contract test already rejects the forbidden form; no drift exists between code, policy docs, and runtime behavior. Bug-folder artifacts are self-documenting. Ready for commit + push + RESULT-ENVELOPE emission.
